Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. RICHARD MILLER, Esq. of Quill and Arrow, LLP (tel: 310-933-4271) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors' unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. RICHARD MILLER, Esq. of Quill and Arrow, LLP (tel: 310-933-4271) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors' unopposed motion to strike is granted with leave to amend.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
